signals.title: Fresh benchmark with replicated RAG evaluation
signals.content: A recent academic paper reports replicated benchmarks for retrieval-augmented generation reliability and context quality.

signals.title: Older foundational retrieval survey
signals.content: A useful survey explains the foundations of retrieval systems but predates current agent workflows.

signals.title: Undated but relevant lab note
signals.content: The note describes context evaluation methods but does not include a reliable publication timestamp.

signals.title: Malformed date metadata
signals.content: This candidate has useful text but malformed date metadata.

signals.title: Future-dated preprint record
signals.content: This candidate appears to be dated after the retrieval time and should be treated cautiously.

signals.title: Low relevance neighboring topic
signals.content: A paper about unrelated data visualization workflows with only weak relevance to context judgment.

signals.title: Overscored candidate from caller
signals.content: A candidate whose caller-provided semantic score is above the allowed range and must be clamped.

signals.title: Underscored candidate from caller
signals.content: A candidate whose caller-provided semantic score is below the allowed range and must be clamped.

signals.title: Current methods comparison
signals.content: A current comparison of context selection, reranking, and citation-readiness methods.

signals.title: Recent provenance evaluation paper
signals.content: A recent paper discusses provenance-aware evaluation for agent retrieval pipelines.

signals.title: Mid-quality agent memory paper
signals.content: A moderately relevant paper explores agent memory and context windows without citation-readiness analysis.
